summary: CRM Intelligence Pack testing completed - 21/21 backend tests passed (100%). All CRM intelligence features working: dashboard, lead timeline (notes, follow-ups, stage changes), sales KPIs, marketing performance, and CRM settings with auth. Frontend pages load and display data correctly.

crm_dashboard.notes: Returns summary (total_leads, won, lost, quote_sent, overdue_followups, stale_leads), by_stage breakdown, and by_source breakdown

add_lead_note.notes: Adds note to lead timeline. Validates note is required. Returns updated lead with timeline.

schedule_follow_up.notes: Sets next_follow_up_at on lead and adds timeline event. Validates date is required.

update_lead_stage.notes: Updates stage and captures win/lost reasons. Adds stage_change event to timeline.

sales_kpis.notes: Returns lead_count, won_count, lost_count, quote_count, total_revenue, conversion_rate

marketing_performance.notes: Returns by-source breakdown with leads, quotes, won counts per source

crm_settings_auth.notes: Requires Bearer token auth. Returns settings with pipeline_stages, lost_reasons, win_reasons, default_follow_up_days, stale_lead_days

crm_settings_update.notes: Updates CRM settings. Data persistence verified.

lead_creation_with_scoring.notes: Creates lead with auto-computed lead_score (0-100), timeline creation event, and default next_follow_up_at

frontend_crm_intelligence.notes: Page loads with stat cards (Total Leads, Won, Lost, Quote Sent, Overdue Follow-ups, Stale Leads), Sales Summary panel, Pipeline by Stage panel, Lead Sources panel, Marketing Source Performance panel

frontend_crm_settings.notes: Page loads with all form elements: Pipeline Stages, Lost Reasons, Win Reasons, Default Follow-up Days, Stale Lead Days, Industries, Lead Sources, Save button

lead_scoring_details.implementation: lead_scoring_service.py computes score from 0-100 based on:
criteria: Decision maker (10 pts): if decision_maker_name provided
Expected close date (5 pts): if expected_close_date provided

timeline_events.structure: Each event has: event_type, label, actor_email, note, meta, created_at

critical_code_review_comments: crm_intelligence_routes.py: Clean implementation with timeline service integration. Proper validation on required fields.
crm_timeline_service.py: Reusable helper function for adding timeline events with proper $push and $set operations
lead_scoring_service.py: Simple scoring algorithm. Note: string matching could be improved with more flexible patterns
CRM settings properly requires auth - uses HTTPBearer security
Frontend pages have comprehensive data-testid attributes for testing
Minor: Pipeline Stages in settings shows multiple TEST_stage entries from test runs - consider cleanup

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Both CRM Intelligence and CRM Settings pages load and function correctly)

seed_data_creation: Test leads created with TEST_ prefix during testing. Pipeline stages may have TEST_stage entries from test runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Intelligence Pack fully tested. Lead status for creation endpoint uses LeadStatus enum: 'new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'proposal_sent', 'won', 'lost' (not 'new_lead'). The stage field in crm-intelligence endpoints is different from status and accepts any string including the pipeline_stages from settings (new_lead, contacted, qualified, meeting_demo, quote_sent, negotiation, won, lost, dormant). CRM settings endpoint requires Bearer token auth.
